div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 59px; height: 1px; padding-top: 176px; margin-left: 509px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; width: 57px; max-height: 38px; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-family: "Helvetica"; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; width: 100%; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

ellipse.style: fill: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));
fill: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));
